normalization: The pinned dataset card was summarized without retaining the videos or dataset rows. CSV observations use a separate byte-pinned source snapshot.
rights_note: The source declares CC BY 4.0. This repository retains attribution, hashes, schema-level observations, and aggregate QA only.

items.normalized_evidence: At pinned revision 6eb94f7f23e8ecf198900b3cf9b9cf5f5359b1f2, the dataset card declares CC BY 4.0 and covers 15 product videos from Veo 3.1, Adobe Firefly Video, and Grok Imagine, not Seedance.
The card documents five top-level evaluation dimensions covering brand and text, material realism, camera adherence, multi-shot continuity, and product consistency.

notes: Use only as research input for an observable-video ontology after normalization; never as Seedance architecture or golden-prompt evidence.
